title: echinochloa crus-galli var. crus-corvi
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli var. crus-corvi, commonly known as barnyard grass, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of barnyard grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The herbal preparations of barnyard grass include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
